verse_text: Destruction and Death said, 'We have heard about its fame.'

pericope.title: The Lord Rebukes and Redeems Job's Friends

links.context: In Hebrew, Abaddon refers to destruction ([[JOB.28:22]] and 31:12, Hebrew text). Apollyon is the masculine Greek form for "destroyer." There may be an allusion here to the Greek god Apollo, with whom the emperors Caligula, Nero, and Domitian claimed a special relationship.
